name: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B Instruct
license: NVIDIA Open Model License + Llama 3.1 Community License Agreement
note: RLHF (REINFORCE)-tuned Llama-3.1-70B that led Arena Hard/AlpacaEval/MT-Bench in Oct 2024, edging GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet.
tpsNote: Needs ~42GB at Q4 — doesn't fit a single 24GB RTX 4090; no verified 4090 benchmark found.

results.notes: #1 on Arena Hard as of Oct 1 2024

Shown on the HF model card via an automated third-party evaluation-results widget (linking to TIGER-Lab/MMLU-Pro leaderboard and the community 'evaleval' results datastore), not stated in NVIDIA's own prose/table -- treated as independent/aggregator rather than self-reported.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via HF model card (fetched): 128K max input context, dual NVIDIA/Llama 3.1 license, and all three benchmark scores (Arena Hard 85.0, AlpacaEval 2 LC 57.6, MT-Bench 8.98) match exactly. Release date corrected to 2024-10-15 (independently confirmed via multiple secondary sources, e.g. NGC catalog coverage) — note the HF card/arXiv paper is dated Oct 1-2 2024 for the underlying technical report, while the public HF model release date is Oct 15, 2024; paramsB 70.6B is the standard precise figure for the Llama-3-70B architecture (70,553,706,496 params) that this model is built on, consistent with NVIDIA's usage.
